title: fibigia umbellata
intro: Fibigia umbellata, also known as the Chinese fumitory or fumitory, is a perennial plant native to China, characterized by its yellow flowers and umbrella-like inflorescence. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its purported diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Fibigia umbellata include its potential to treat kidney stones, gout, and other urinary issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, Fibigia umbellata is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
